function.message: I worked the oldest inbox item (`00_inbox/724_next-task.md`) and validated the OCR request. Four listed purchase records exist, but the fifth requested file (`50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_07__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md`) is missing from the workspace, so I cannot fully complete the requested 5-file OCR task without guessing or silently doing a partial result.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox and workflow rules, when required source support is missing, stop without mutating workspace; do not produce partial completion.
function.outcome_justification: `read` on the exact requested fifth path returned file-not-found, and `list` of `50_finance/purchases` confirmed no file with the leading-underscore name exists. Because the inbox explicitly requests OCR of five specific files, completing only four would be a partial result requiring guessing/omission.
